refactorings_applied: DRY: Extract readSourceFile() helper to eliminate 12 redundant fs.readFileSync calls
DRY: Use beforeAll() hooks to read file content once per describe block instead of per-test
Consistency verification: Confirmed dynamic import patterns in terminal/page.tsx and WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx match MermaidCodeBlock.tsx reference implementation
YAGNI: Confirmed loading indicator commonization is not needed (only 2 instances, wait for 3rd before abstracting)
commits: ceaf15b: refactor(test): eliminate redundant fs.readFileSync calls in dynamic-import-patterns tests

consistency_check.dynamic_import_pattern: All 3 components (TerminalComponent, MarkdownEditor, MermaidDiagram) use identical .then((mod) => ({ default: mod.Xxx })) pattern with ssr: false
consistency_check.loading_components: Each component has a context-appropriate loading indicator (terminal: bg-gray-900, editor: bg-white, mermaid: custom)

yagni_decisions.reason: Only 2 instances (Terminal/Editor) with different themes. Extract at 3rd occurrence.

message: Refactoring complete. Eliminated redundant file I/O in test file (12 fs.readFileSync calls reduced to 5 via beforeAll + readSourceFile helper). Confirmed dynamic import patterns are consistent across all components. All 4411 tests pass. Static analysis clean (0 TypeScript errors, 0 ESLint errors).
